stories.title: MPs call on UK and Welsh Governments to tackle coal tips and contaminated land in Wales
stories.summary: MPs on the Welsh Affairs Committee have called on the UK and Welsh Governments to work together on coal tip safety, contaminated land, and metal mine pollution across Wales. In a letter sent today to the Secretary of State for Wales, Rt Hon Jo Stevens MP, the Committee welcomed UK Government funding for coal tip

stories.title: Royal Air Force brings nationwide Town Show to Wrexham for three days of free events
stories.summary: The Royal Air Force is bringing its free Town Show to Wrexham city centre this Friday, with a full-scale Chinook aircraft replica set to occupy Queen’s Square for the opening two days of the event. The three-day show runs from 24 to 26 April at Llwyn Isaf, opening each day at 09:00 and closing at

stories.title: New twist on ‘Hi Mum’ scam sees criminals impersonating parents in text messages
stories.summary: North Wales Police have warned residents to be on guard for text messages that appear to come from a parent claiming to have lost or forgotten their bank card and asking for money. NWP Cyber Crime issued the warning after seeing a rise in reports of the scam, in which fraudsters pose as a parent

stories.title: Mold man charged with GBH and intentional strangulation following domestic violence incident
stories.summary: A 43-year-old man from Mold has been charged with causing grievous bodily harm with intent and intentional strangulation following an alleged domestic violence incident on 3 February. Richard Davies, of Bank Villas, Mold, appeared before Mold Magistrates Court on Saturday, 18 April. He was remanded in custody and is due to appear before Mold Crown

stories.title: Roadworks across Flintshire this week: closures and traffic lights affecting routes across the county
stories.summary: A number of road closures and temporary traffic lights are in place across Flintshire this week, affecting routes in Shotton, Buckley, Connah’s Quay, Holywell, Flint, Mold and surrounding areas.
